sentences.english: The hardest part of learning a language is speaking with confidence.
sentences.korean: 언어 학습에서 가장 어려운 부분은 자신감 있게 말하는 거예요.

sentences.english: I always worry about making mistakes.
There are so many words to remember, and I keep forgetting them.
sentences.korean: 기억해야 할 단어가 너무 많고 자꾸 잊어버려요.

sentences.english: I think listening is the toughest, because native speakers talk so fast.
sentences.korean: 듣기가 가장 어렵다고 생각해요, 원어민이 너무 빨리 말해서요.

sentences.english: I can read it fine, but I can't understand when people talk.
sentences.korean: 읽으면 괜찮은데 사람들이 말할 때 이해를 못 해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
